title: ATTICUS_MPO branch-history and baseline lineage
content: ATTICUS_MPO branch and baseline lineage is anchored by release-candidate as the active clean baseline, with key promotions and sync-backs recorded in WORK_LOG.md. Recovery phases 1a through 7 were merged into release-candidate across PRs #78, #82, #83, #84, #85, #86, and #87, then promoted to release/stable in PR #88 and synced back to release-candidate in PR #89.
context_summary: Durable branch-history cell for MPO. Captures the baseline promotion chain and the fact that release-candidate is the governing active branch for current work.
